name: National Breweries PLC
description: National Breweries PLC (Natbrew) is a Zambian brewer specializing in traditional opaque beer, primarily Chibuku, a sorghum-based beverage popular in Zambian communities. Listed on the LuSE Main Board since 2003. The company operates with a March fiscal year-end. Natbrew has been struggling with persistent losses, facing competition from both formal clear beers (Zambian Breweries) and informal home-brewed alternatives.

financials.note: March fiscal year-end. FY2025 = year ended March 31, 2025. Consecutive losses: FY2024 loss K545.5M, FY2025 loss K442.5M (improved but still deeply negative). Revenue declining 18%.

topHolders.name: AB InBev / Zambian Breweries
topHolders.note: Likely controlled by same parent as ZABR; exact stake unconfirmed

analystNotes.note: National Breweries is a zombie company in slow decline: two consecutive years of massive losses (FY2024: -K545M, FY2025: -K442M), with revenue down 18% to K436M. Operating losses exceed 75% of revenue — the cost structure is broken. The opaque beer market is under pressure from rising clear beer consumption and informal competition. At a market cap of ZMW 180M (companies.json), this is a micro-cap walking corpse. The only plausible investment thesis is a turnaround/acquisition by AB InBev (which already controls ZABR), but there's no visible catalyst. The company is burning through cash and has no dividend.
analystNotes.author: Vituli Musukuma, PhD

riskFactors: Operating losses exceeding 75% of revenue — business model is broken
Two consecutive years of losses exceeding ZMW 440M each
No dividend — zero return to shareholders
investmentThesis: There is no investment thesis for National Breweries. It's a loss-making, revenue-declining micro-cap in a structurally challenged opaque beer market. The only reason to own it would be a speculative bet on an AB InBev restructuring or acquisition, but with no visible catalyst, that's gambling, not investing. Avoid.
dataSources: National Breweries FY2025 Abridged Report (via AfricanFinancials, MarketScreener)
dataQuality: MEDIUM — Core P&L from audited reports confirmed. Balance sheet details unavailable. Ownership structure unconfirmed.
